---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve Drake
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Run '....'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. macOS 15, Ubuntu 24.04]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.12]
- Git version: [e.g. 2.45]
- Drake version / commit: [e.g. main@abc1234]

## Logs and Screenshots

If applicable, add logs, error output, or screenshots to help explain the
problem.

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here, such as related issues or
workarounds you have tried.
